Millions of consumers already earn cash back on everyday brands with apps like Ibotta. Healthier Together brings that same familiar mechanic to your members — no new behavior to learn, wrapped in benefits-grade compliance and paid onto the plan's Sunny Rewards card.

If you ever used Ibotta, then you know how Healthier Together works. The mechanic is proven at consumer scale — what's new is the benefits wrapper: brand-funded, compliant, and paid onto the card you already give them.
